metrics.heading: Overall Mood
metrics.phrase: Wipro feels mostly okay overall, like when you're not super excited or sad.
metrics.label: Steady

metrics.heading: Company Outlook
metrics.phrase: They see some issues ahead, kind of like when a storm is coming and you can't be sure if it will rain or shine.
metrics.label: Concerning

metrics.heading: Sustainability
metrics.phrase: Wipro thinks their green efforts are doing well, like how you feel proud after cleaning up your room.
metrics.label: Clean

metrics.heading: Environmental
metrics.phrase: The company likes its eco-friendly projects, similar to feeling good about planting trees in a park.
metrics.label: Green

metrics.heading: People & Society
metrics.phrase: Management says they treat people well, just like when your teacher gives out gold stars for good behavior.
metrics.label: Good

metrics.heading: Corporate Governance
metrics.phrase: Wipro believes their leadership is transparent and honest, like how you feel when your friend tells the truth about sharing cookies with others.
metrics.label: Strong

metrics.heading: Management Honesty
metrics.phrase: The bosses are open and honest, similar to how a parent might be upfront about chores they need to do.
metrics.label: Open

metrics.heading: Financial Health
metrics.phrase: Their finances aren't great right now, more like when you're short on allowance money compared to having plenty.
metrics.label: Average

metrics.heading: Growth Plans
metrics.phrase: They want to grow but have some challenges ahead, just like when you dream of becoming a superhero but know it might be tough.
metrics.label: Ambitious

metrics.heading: Risk Level
metrics.phrase: There are big risks they need to watch out for, similar to how you'd keep an eye on a wild animal in the zoo.
metrics.label: Danger Zone

metrics.heading: Investor Confidence
metrics.phrase: People trust Wipro's decisions and financials, like when your parents believe you can clean your room without help.
metrics.label: Very Trusted
